description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow should have multiple jobs for testing on different operating systems (Ubuntu, Windows, macOS) and architectures (aarch64), with various Python versions. Each test job should check out the code, set up Python, update pip, install tox, and run tests with tox. Additionally, there should be jobs for building source distributions and wheels for different Python versions and architectures, and uploading the results as artifacts.
